# Art of Aviation Community Mural

> A collaborative community mural project celebrating Reno, Nevada's 250th anniversary and Northern Nevada's pioneering spirit in aviation.

## Overview

The Art of Aviation Community Mural invites 234 artists to each paint one square of a professional aviation-themed mural. The completed mural will be unveiled at The Discovery Museum on July 2nd during the Artown Kickoff celebration.

## How to Participate

1. Visit https://artowncommunitymural.com/ and select an available square from the 18×13 grid
2. Register with your name and contact information
3. Pick up your canvas at The Discovery Museum after May 1
4. Paint your square — any material welcome, match colors as closely as possible
5. Return your completed square by Monday, June 22nd

## Key Dates

- Registration: Open now at https://artowncommunitymural.com/
- Canvas pickup: After May 1 at The Discovery Museum
- Canvas return deadline: June 22, 2025
- Community Reception & Mural Unveiling: July 2, 2025 at The Discovery Museum (Artown Kickoff)
- Red, White & Flight Drone Show & Concert: July 4, 2025 at Mackay Stadium (free event — https://redwhiteandflight.org/)

## Partners & Funders

- **The George W. Gillemot Foundation** — Key funder of the original professional mural artwork, supporting aviation education and inspiring the next generation of aerospace leaders
- **Artown** — Reno's premier arts and culture festival (https://artown.org/)
- **The Discovery Museum** — Terry Lee Wells Nevada Discovery Museum, host venue (https://nvdm.org/)
- **Strengthen our Community** — Presenting partner building a stronger Northern Nevada (https://socnnv.org/)

## Location

The Discovery - Terry Lee Wells Nevada Discovery Museum
490 S Center St, Reno, NV 89501

## Contact

Website: https://artowncommunitymural.com/
Email: noreply@artowncommunitymural.com

## Related Events

Red, White & Flight — July 4th drone show, Reno Philharmonic concert, and interactive aerospace expo at Mackay Stadium. Free admission. https://redwhiteandflight.org/
